title: Infinite Void
description: Adds a new dimension to Minecraft with nothing in it. Perfect for building! Made with MCreator.
body:
_There are some big issues with this mod that will cause incompatiblity with previous versions if fixed. Version 2.0.0 with these will come at some point in the future._

This mod adds a brand new dimension to the game called "Infinite Void". The dimension is completely empty except for the portal that you came through. This gives you an endless amount of unobstructed space to do anything you want.

**I highly recommend using JEI/REI to view the recipes.**

Please join the discord server so that you can suggest features/changes and hear about future plans.

**Main Features:**

The portal frame used to enter the dimension is built like a nether portal frame using glass.

![Portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aab2c0cbba825f46a33fdac14e608a4c33a42236.png)


To light the portal, you need a new item called the Dead Eye. Dead Eyes can also create items known as Void Essence.

![Texture for Dead Eye](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/199f035879062e409b68b8519a125adf4873e3a9.png)
![Void Essence](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2dbf7aebaeb6fbd468297712dab17d4d9374f54a.png)

With 8 Void Essence and a Totem of Undying you can create a Totem of Avoidance. These work in any dimension and will teleport you back to your spawn point in the overworld without losing any items. These will be very useful in the Infinite Void and the End.

![Totem of Avoidance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41115b579e4099bb64032a2aaed2dd061bf3c30a.png)

With 1 Totem of Avoidance, 3 Blackstone, and 5 Void Essence you can create a Void Anchor. The Void Anchor will teleport you on top of itself when you fall into the void. If you break it nothing will drop. It will break itself if you are not in the Infinite Void Dimension when you place it or when a new Void Anchor is placed in the Infinite Void Dimension. You can have only 1 Void Anchor placed in a Minecraft world.

![The Void Anchor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/344a981e5ed8ea772955c2d1a326a83b977d6c62.png)

**Food Items:**

You can also smoke the Dead Eye to create a Smoked Eye. A Smoked Eye is a food item that is really bad, but you can use it to create a much better item.

![Smoked Eye](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c33f8c9c06d848748b56b7b53d7479f2b3a4b341.png)

The Smoked Eye, along with a Fermented Spider Eye, Carrot, and Bowl can create an Eye Soup. Eye Soups when consumed give nausea for a short period of time along with Night Vision. They will also remove the Darkness/Blindness effect from you if you have it.

![Eye Soup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/396db1285b5aceac8629fd3ad02ac51b8c04d505.png)

I hope that you can enjoy this mod!

**Please report any bugs/suggestions on the Discord.**

_Made with MCreator - Go check it out!_

_Feel free to use this in your modpack! I'd prefer credit in a link to this mod page._

_I do not permit anyone to reupload this mod onto any other website without my permission. Please report any project not following this guideline._
